description_long: This object is a large, flat-screen television with a minimalist, modern design. The front is dominated by a smooth, uninterrupted black display surface, likely made of glass or a similar material, with no visible buttons or branding. The television is supported by two slim, angled legs positioned near the edges, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The back panel is subtly textured with horizontal lines and appears to be constructed from matte black plastic, with mounting points possibly for wall brackets. The side profile reveals the television's ultra-thin form factor, with a slight bulge at the lower rear section, likely housing internal electronics and ports. No visible ports, buttons, or branding are present on any view, emphasizing a clean and streamlined appearance.
description: A large, ultra-thin flat-screen television with a sleek black display, supported by two minimalist legs and a subtly textured back panel.
description_view_0: The front view shows a seamless, glossy black screen with no visible buttons, branding, or bezel details, supported by two slim legs.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the television's ultra-thin profile, with a slight bulge at the lower rear for internal components and support legs visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a matte black, horizontally textured panel with mounting points and the two support legs, but no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again emphasizes the thinness of the television and the positioning of the support legs, mirroring the other side.
